The Mist (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,593,755Details
International Box Office $31,595,653
Worldwide Box Office $57,189,408
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $31,071,642
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,454,475
Total $32,526,117
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After a brutal storm pounds a small town, the residents discover a malevolent mist that hangs over their homes, killing anyone who remains outside.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,931,973 (34.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.87 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$13,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,423 opening theaters/2,423 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $44,469,899

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 21st, 2007 (Wide) by MGM
Video Release: March 25th, 2008 by Weinstein Co./Genius
MPA Rating: R for violence, terror and gore, and language
Running Time: 126 minutes
Franchise: The Mist
Plot point: Monster, Parasite, Surprise Twist
Subgenre: Isolation Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
